posts.text:
Minute-long story made w Grok Imagine

Video

Grok


X Freeze (@XFreeze)

Every legacy media headline credited the other guys, just found out that Grok is the one that actually designed the final construct for Rose the dog that actually shrank her cancer by 75%







— https://nitter.net/XFreeze/status/2034555264540495978#m

Cool


Doge Norway (@DogecoinNorway)

Looking for land and to build a house!  
Grok is helping me with all the paperwork and design.

Just in the start phase, but it looks like Grok will save me lots of money in the process of building the house!! 

Love it!!

Thank you @grok and @elonmusk



— https://nitter.net/DogecoinNorway/status/2034551921286189187#m

It’s fun and super easy to use!


DogeDesigner (@cb_doge)
